name: osint_web
summary: Jose Manuel Amado Abelenda is a sports and wellness entrepreneur based in Oleiros, A Coruña, Spain. He is the President and founder of the Clúster Galego da Industria do Deporte e o Benestar and founding partner/sole proprietor of Motivos Singulares S.L. He holds a degree in Physical Activity and Sport Sciences from INEF de Galicia and is an investor in health, exercise, and nutrition projects. His corporate footprint in the Spanish BORME spans over 21 companies across sports, tourism, and nutrition sectors.

facts.claim: Described publicly as 'Presidente y fundador' in a LinkedIn post by Vertical Proyect
Has 3 active corporate roles, 31 historical roles, across 21 total companies per BORME
Featured as participant in Capacita Directivos executive training programme
